name: MixtarRVS Base Closure 0013
purpose: Install the minimal rootfs image builder dependency needed by MixtarRVS, using apk as the explicit hidden compatibility backend, without creating a rootfs image, switching generations, rebuilding initramfs, or changing bootloader state.

dependency.reason: rootfs.squashfs image generation for future MixtarRVS generations

allowed_mutations: apk may install squashfs-tools and its required package metadata.
/System/Config/ImageBuilder/rootfs-image.requirements may be updated to record staged builder dependency.
non_goals: Do not create a new bootable generation.
postconditions: mixtar-generation build --dry-run still reports would_create_generation=false and would_activate_generation=false.
known_limitations: This stage installs the image builder dependency only; it does not build an image.
apk remains the hidden compatibility backend.
Activation, switch, boot, rollback, and garbage collection are still missing.
The active root is still a mutable ext4 install.
